description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical flashlight with a textured grip along the main body for secure handling. The head of the flashlight is wider and features a prominent lens, likely made of clear plastic or glass, surrounded by a protective bezel. A single, raised button is visible on the side, serving as the primary control for turning the device on and off. The tail end is slightly tapered and may include a removable cap for battery access. The overall construction appears robust, with a matte black finish and subtle ridges for added grip. This flashlight is designed for portability and durability, suitable for use in urban environments such as streets, garages, or parks.
description: A compact, black cylindrical flashlight with a textured grip, wide lens head, and a side button for control. Built for portability and durability in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the textured grip, wide lens head, and the prominent side button.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tapered tail end and the cylindrical body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the flashlight and the textured grip.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the large, circular lens and the protective bezel.
